scenario: Android assetlinks export matches manifest truth
iOS association export matches allowed paths
expected_result: /.well-known/apple-app-site-association contains configured NHS App appID and paths

scenario: First-use pharmacy status site link resolves to full route
expected_result: resolved_full with PHI allowed only after grant redemption

scenario: Replayed site-link grant goes to bounded recovery
expected_result: replayed grant has no PHI and recover_only decision

scenario: Expired site-link grant goes to fallback status route
expected_result: expired grant has no PHI and safe fallback target

scenario: Configured email link opens in NHS App site-link path
expected_result: allowed path is present in Android and iOS association payloads

scenario: Unconfigured SMS link remains browser fallback
expected_result: path outside manifest is not associated and requires verification

scenario: Cross-patient shared link denies full detail
expected_result: subject mismatch denies PHI and does not reuse session

scenario: Promoted pre-submit draft cannot reopen mutable draft
expected_result: promoted draft resolves to request shell recovery only
